mainCharacter.name: Sun Wukong
mainCharacter.backstory: A stone-born monkey who studies Daoist arts, rebels against heaven, and later joins the pilgrimage to protect the monk Tang Sanzang.

supportCharacters.name: White Dragon Horse
supportCharacters.identity: Dragon prince transformed into Tang Sanzang's mount

supportCharacters.name: Red Boy
supportCharacters.identity: Son of the Bull Demon King and Princess Iron Fan

supportCharacters.name: Six-Eared Macaque
supportCharacters.identity: A powerful double of Sun Wukong
